tasks.title: Core Joystick System Enhancement
tasks.description: Implement click-through mode and optimize real-time mouse tracking performance for the virtual joystick system
tasks.details: Enhance core/logic.py to implement click-through mode allowing mouse passthrough when not actively controlling joystick. Optimize mouse tracking to achieve sub-10ms latency. Add configurable visual feedback options including color transitions and transparency effects. Implement circular area constraints with proper deadzone filtering and automatic position reset when mouse exits window.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for mouse coordinate conversion, latency measurement tests to verify <10ms response time, visual feedback validation, and deadzone accuracy testing with various mouse movements

subtasks.title: 클릭스루 모드 이벤트 처리
subtasks.description: 마우스 패스스루 윈도우 이벤트 처리 시스템

subtasks.title: 원형 영역 제약 시스템
subtasks.description: 조이스틱 원형 범위 및 데드존 필터링

subtasks.title: 시각적 피드백 시스템
subtasks.description: 색상 전환 및 투명도 효과 구현

subtasks.title: 자동 위치 리셋 기능
subtasks.description: 윈도우 벗어남 시 자동 위치 초기화

tasks.title: Button System Mode Implementation
tasks.description: Complete hover and click activation modes with gauge visualization and timing controls
tasks.details: Enhance ui/button_widget.py to fully implement hover activation with progress gauge (0.0-1.0 scale), click interaction modes, and press/holding/toggle behaviors. Add timer-based progress visualization with color transitions, configurable dwell time and release time parameters. Implement drag repositioning, resize handles in edit mode, and double-click settings access.
tasks.testStrategy: Test gauge timing accuracy, hover detection precision, click response validation, and visual feedback consistency. Verify drag operations and resize functionality work correctly in edit mode

subtasks.title: 타이머 기반 진행 시각화
subtasks.description: 색상 전환과 시간 설정 가능한 진행바

subtasks.title: 버튼 재배치 시스템
subtasks.description: 드래그 앤 드롭으로 버튼 위치 조정

subtasks.title: 버튼 크기 조절 핸들
subtasks.description: 편집 모드에서 버튼 크기 실시간 조절

tasks.title: Mode Management System
tasks.description: Implement robust edit/play mode switching with enhanced window focus management
tasks.details: Enhance core/app_manager.py and core/mode_controller.py to provide seamless switching between play mode (input transmission enabled, UI minimized) and edit mode (repositioning enabled, no input transmission). Implement automatic game window detection using Steam, Unity patterns and SetForegroundWindow API for focus maintenance. Add per-game profile loading based on focused application.
tasks.testStrategy: Test mode switching reliability, window focus management across different games, profile auto-loading functionality, and verify no accidental input transmission in edit mode

subtasks.title: 게임 윈도우 자동 감지
subtasks.description: Steam, Unity 패턴 기반 게임 인식

tasks.title: Configuration Management Enhancement
tasks.description: Enhance INI and JSON configuration system with validation and persistence optimization
tasks.details: Improve core/settings.py to handle joystick INI configuration and button JSON configuration with robust error handling. Implement configuration validation, automatic backup creation, and migration support for configuration format updates. Add real-time configuration updates without requiring application restart.
tasks.testStrategy: Test configuration save/load reliability, validation of malformed configs, migration between config versions, and real-time update functionality

subtasks.title: INI 파일 검증
subtasks.description: INI 설정 파일 형식 및 값 검증

tasks.title: Button Editor Dialog Enhancement
tasks.description: Complete button editor with comprehensive configuration options and live preview
tasks.details: Enhance ui/button_editor.py to provide complete configuration interface including output mapping selection (gamepad buttons, keyboard keys, mouse actions), action mode configuration, timing settings, and visual customization. Implement live preview functionality, position/size adjustments, and validation for all configuration options.
tasks.testStrategy: Test all configuration options work correctly, live preview accuracy, validation of invalid inputs, and proper saving/loading of button configurations

tasks.title: Profile Management System
tasks.description: Implement per-game profile system with automatic loading and import/export functionality
tasks.details: Create comprehensive profile management system supporting per-game configurations with automatic loading based on window title detection. Implement profile import/export functionality, favorite profiles tracking, recent usage history, and profile templates. Add profile validation and conflict resolution.
tasks.testStrategy: Test automatic profile switching, import/export functionality, profile validation, and ensure profiles load correctly for different games

subtasks.title: 자동 프로필 로딩
subtasks.description: 게임 실행 시 자동 프로필 적용

subtasks.title: 프로필 검색 및 관리
subtasks.description: 프로필 목록 관리 및 검색 기능

tasks.title: Input/Output Processing Optimization
tasks.description: Optimize vgamepad, pynput integration for minimal latency and maximum compatibility
tasks.details: Optimize output/ modules (gamepad_output.py, keyboard_output.py, mouse_handler.py) to achieve sub-10ms mouse→gamepad conversion. Implement signal-based decoupled processing, enhance error handling for input/output operations, and ensure compatibility with 95%+ of mainstream games. Add input validation and sanitization.
tasks.testStrategy: Latency measurement tests, compatibility testing across different games, input accuracy validation, and stress testing with extended gaming sessions

subtasks.title: 입력 큐 최적화
subtasks.description: 입력 이벤트 큐 처리 속도 향상

tasks.title: Basic Macro System Implementation
tasks.description: Implement sequential command recording and playbook with turbo mode support
tasks.details: Create basic macro system supporting sequential command recording and playback, complex input patterns (A → B → L ↑, simultaneous inputs), and turbo mode with configurable auto-press intervals. Implement macro validation, syntax checking, and integration with button system for macro assignment.
tasks.testStrategy: Test macro recording accuracy, playback reliability, turbo mode timing precision, and validate complex input pattern execution

tasks.title: Performance Optimization and Quality Assurance
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive performance monitoring and optimization to meet accessibility standards
tasks.details: Implement performance monitoring to achieve <5% CPU usage during gameplay, maintain 60fps UI animations, and ensure <10ms input latency. Add comprehensive error handling, logging system for debugging, and memory optimization. Implement accessibility features including high contrast options, scalable UI elements, and screen reader compatibility.
tasks.testStrategy: Performance benchmarking, resource usage monitoring during extended sessions, accessibility compliance testing, and user experience validation with target disability communities

subtasks.title: 메모리 누수 검사
subtasks.description: 장시간 실행 시 메모리 안정성 검증

tasks.title: Advanced UI Features and Polish
tasks.description: Implement advanced editor features including grid snapping, multi-select operations, and undo/redo functionality
tasks.details: Add advanced editor enhancements including drag snapping and alignment guides, grid-based positioning system, multi-select operations for batch editing, and undo/redo functionality. Implement theme system for visual customization, advanced gauge animation smoothing, and enhanced visual feedback options.
tasks.testStrategy: Test all advanced editor features, verify undo/redo reliability, validate multi-select operations, and ensure smooth animations and visual feedback across different themes
